patch.value: Implement schema scaffold capability in scaffold.ts (manifest/entrypoint/README/define* guidance, omit activation.commands)

Added 'schema' to SCAFFOLD_CAPABILITIES in src/cli/commands/extension/scaffold.ts. The schema starter registers a custom item type (api.registerItemTypes), item field (api.registerItemFields), and migration (api.registerMigration) plus the base ping command; manifest capabilities ['commands','schema']. buildScaffoldActivationCommands returns [] for schema and the manifest omits the activation field (conditional spread) so conservative activation makes the global type available to built-in commands. README gains a '## Custom Schema' section, a schema-specific '## Activation' note (replacing the lazy-activation contract), an accurate manifest 'Included Files' bullet, and define* guidance (defineItemType/defineItemField/defineMigration).

README gains a '## Custom Schema' section, a schema-specific '## Activation' note (replacing the lazy-activation contract), an accurate manifest 'Included Files' bullet, and define* guidance (defineItemType/defineItemField/defineMigration).
